cards.back: Hive is an open-source, distributed SQL-like query language for analyzing large data sets in Hadoop

cards.front: What are the two main components of Hive

cards.back: Basic types like INT, STRING, and BOOLEAN, and complex types like ARRAY and MAP
Text, RC, ORC, and Parquet formats used for storing data

cards.front: What is the purpose of Hive Query
cards.back: To execute queries on data stored in Hadoop, using a SQL-like syntax
